result:
Delivered. The planning pipeline had created a single Story-only ticket (no Epic label — the v2 model is Story-only), so I resolved and delivered **Story #3** through the one delivery engine.

**Terminal envelope:**
```
status: landed · phase: post-land · PR #4 MERGED (checks: success)
gates: validation ✅  baseSync ✅  codeReview ✅ (critical:0 high:0 medium:0)
tail: followUps ✅ statusResync ✅ refCleanup ✅ baseFastForward ✅
Story #3 → agent::done · main fast-forwarded by 1 commit
```
PR: https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-24-epic-scope-mandrel-bcdf0a70/pull/4

**What shipped** (role-scoped project sharing):
- **`store.js`** — new `project_shares(project_id, user_id, role)` table, PK `(project_id, user_id)`, FK-cascade on both parents; `resolveProjectAccess` (owner > editor > viewer, null = no relationship), `createOrUpdateShare` (idempotent upsert), `listProjectsForUser` (owned ∪ shared).
- **`shares.js`** (new) — `POST /projects/:id/shares`, owner-only: authorization (404 unrelated / 403 non-owner) runs *before* body validation, then validates `userId`/`role`, rejects unknown users, bad roles, malformed bodies, and self-sharing → 400.
- **`projects.js` / `tasks.js`** — relationship gating replacing owner-only: reads for any role, task writes for editor+, project delete/share owner-only. Privacy preserved — unrelated callers still get 404 everywhere.
- **`test/api.test.js`** — 9 new contract tests covering AC-1…AC-7 plus role-upsert.

**Verification:** `npm test` 20/20 pass, `npm run typecheck` clean; acceptance self-eval scored 8/8 criteria `met` → `proceed`; close-validation gates + light-depth code review (0 findings) all green.
